title: Metrics Category Management Bug Fixes
story: As a DataTools Pro user managing metric categories, I want the category management interface to prevent invalid entries and display clean UI controls, so that I don't accidentally create blank or duplicate categories.
description:
Fix multiple issues discovered when working with metric categories, documented in a Word doc with videos.

## Fixes
1. Prevent blank rows from being saved to the database (server-side validation)
2. Reduce gap between name field and dropdown box
3. Show validation message when submitting without a value
4. Fix broken close symbol/icon
5. Prevent blank fields from being accepted with any name
6. Block blank rows from being added to the category list
acceptance_criteria: Server-side validation rejects empty category values
Client-side validation shows error message for empty submissions
Blank rows cannot be added to the category list
Gap between name field and dropdown is reduced
Add button is disabled when input is empty
ux_changes: Fixed validation messaging, close icon rendering, and field spacing. Add button disabled until a value is entered.
middleware_changes: Server-side validation added to prevent empty category values from being saved to the database.
implementation_notes: Both client-side and server-side validation added as defense in depth. Server-side check ensures even if the client-side disable is bypassed (e.g., via browser dev tools), empty values are still rejected.
comment_summary: Developer systematically addressed each issue from the documentation, posting updates for each fix. All six issues were resolved and pushed to staging.
